holdings.infoBox: WBIY is an equity ETF with a total of 51 individual holdings. The top holdings are HP Inc. stock at 5.84%, Best Buy Co. at 5.43%, Altria Group at 5.02%, The Campbell's Company at 4.93%, and United Parcel Service at 4.68%.

overview.description: The WBI Power Factor High Dividend ETF (WBIY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high dividend yield equity. The fund tracks an index of 50 US firms selected for high forecasted dividend yield and strong fundamental factors. Holdings are weighted by forecasted dividend yield. WBIY was launched on Dec 19, 2016 and is issued by WBI Shares.
